title: Audit and align PRK derivation in lichen-oscore EDHOC with python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py and test/vectors/edhoc.json
description: Compare HKDF-Extract calls, salt handling, and PRK computation between Rust and Python. Update to produce identical outputs for all test vectors.
close_reason: Aligned HKDF-Extract and salt handling in lichen-oscore::edhoc::hkdf_extract to exactly match Python reference implementation and test vectors. Updated to use hmac crate for byte-identical PRK outputs on TH_2/G_XY and empty-salt cases.
